trigger_reason: R777 is rank by mechanical-PASS proximity in E32 (post-filter architectural candidate with kw=2; tree-stream max sim=0.40). Per program_v10.md §2.5 (preserved in v11/v12/v13), top-3 rounds receive full step-13 spec.
candidate_stripped: Quiver-representation pathway module: new learnable memory module composed of arrows-and-objects path-algebra parameters, persistence pathway between layers, and Auslander-Reiten translation as a learnable transformation.

dataset.name: Long Range Arena (LRA: Pathfinder, ListOps, Text, Retrieval)

A_candidate.name: Quiver-representation pathway module
A_candidate.description: Insert a new persistence pathway module in each layer; module parameterizes inter-token attention with a learnable path-algebra structure (arrow + concatenation as learnable operations); Auslander-Reiten translation acts as a learnable per-layer transformation on the latent representation.

B_control.name: Same architecture WITHOUT the quiver-pathway module

metric.name: LRA Pathfinder accuracy + LRA ListOps accuracy across 3 seeds

statistical_test.name: paired t-test A vs B + A vs C

distinguishability_pre_check.rationale: Quiver-representation pathway is genuinely a NEW computation: the path-algebra is a structured non-commutative monoid on top of attention; concatenating paths produces compositional latent updates that pure attention does not. Auslander-Reiten translation operates on the latent as a learnable invertible map (Hopf-coalgebra-like). Expected: A has different Pathfinder accuracy trajectory from B in first 50K steps, with measurable separation at convergence.
distinguishability_pre_check.v12_observation: Step 05.5 PASS = architectural-topology-change; candidate has new learnable module with distinct computational signature from baseline. Path-algebra composition is genuinely non-commutative; baseline self-attention has no compositional latent structure.

notes_for_executor: R777's architectural-topology candidate (post-v12-step-05.5-PASS) has structurally-distinct mechanism from baseline B. The new persistence pathway module adds non-commutative compositional latent structure not present in standard self-attention.
